title: add flag to record memory profiles
body:
Add a new flag `--memory-profile=$path` which creates a memory profile.
The generated profile can later be analyzed via `go tool pprof`.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

@baude, PTAL

LGTM. Is the output only a moment-of-time snapshot as Podman finished up, or does it include how memory use changed over time?
